programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: When a local pub landlord is beaten to death, Wycliffe can find few people with a good word to say about him. A police informant points the finger at the victims former wife and her new husband.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Under the spotlight of an internal investigation and lacking support from his superiors, Wycliffes problems multiply when an old case resurfaces, and DCC Stevens wants to prove Wycliffe is no longer up to the job.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A North Oxford housewife is found hanged in her home and the initial investigation suggests suicide. Rachel Mallory leaves behind her devastated husband Hugh and her two young daughters, but Lewis instincts tell him that something is wrong with the suicide verdict. He strikes up a friendship with the Mallorys neighbour, Stephanie Fielding, who points him in the direction of a key piece of information.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: New series of the detective drama. When botanist Liv Nash accidentally digs up the body of the recently buried Murray Hawes, Lewis and Hathaway are set upon a seemingly impossible quest. Murray was a man possessed, fixated upon solving an impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. Could his obsession have been dangerous enough to get him killed?

programme.title: Goodnight Mister Tom
programme.desc: World War II tale in which a curmudgeonly widower living in a small village takes in a nine-year-old evacuee from London. The widower soon realises that his young charge has been damaged both mentally and physically at the hands of his strict mother. He sets about undoing the damage, teaching the youngster to read, write and draw, but as his tenth birthday looms, the child is summoned back to the city.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A glassware factory in Midsomer Magna faces ruin after the death of its co-owner Alan King. His widow Hilary angers her son Ian by marrying Alans brother Charles, and rumours begin to circulate that Charles and accountant Peter Baxter have embezzled funds. When Peter is stabbed to death with a Masonic dagger and Ian starts behaving strangely, Barnaby is called.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When old rock band Hired Gun re-form to play a gig at the Midsomer Rocks Festival, paranoid lead singer Gary Cooper is convinced that someone is trying to scare them off and stop the reunion. Firstly, rock diva Mimi Clifton is electrocuted on stage, then drummer Nicky Harding is found dead in his swimming pool. Barnaby has to face the possibility that one of his heroes is a murderer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Dr Alan Delaney is killed by a hit-and-run driver, Barnaby realises that the real target was Delaneys senior partner, Dr James Kirkwood. Is the killer trying to prevent James from marrying beautiful divorcee Delyth Mostyn? How is the death linked to the £30,000 which is missing from the surgery account?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a photo of DCI Barnaby with another woman is displayed shortly before her estranged husband is murdered, he becomes a prime suspect in the crime. To make matters worse, it appears that Barnaby visited the victim on the night he died, and a glass with his fingerprints on it is found at the dead mans home. As the evidence begins to mount up against him, will Barnaby be able to clear his name?

programme.title: McDonald and Dodds
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the House of Crockett
programme.desc: When a man is shot in the deserted mansion of inventor Maxton Crockett, one of Baths most prominent industrialists, newly arrived DCI McDonald and DS Dodds unravel a tangled web of lies as they attempt to find the identity of the killer.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The police drama series returns. A 20-year-old missing persons case is re-opened when the remains of a teenage girl are finally found. With the mother desperate to discover the truth about her daughters disappearance, Frost attempts to get to the bottom of a case that has spanned two decades.

programme.desc: Stan takes Olive to the divorce courts.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Food Factory

programme.desc: Leo, a tiny leopard tortoise, is having trouble breathing, which Dr T thinks might have something to do with pneumonia.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: Thord Paulsen and his colleagues must fight against snow and icy winds as they rescue cars and trucks on Norways slippery mountain roads.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: Thord Paulsen and his colleagues must fight against snow and icy winds as they rescue cars and trucks on Norways slippery mountain roads.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are off to Northampton to take on one of the strangest vehicles in British automotive history - a 1970 three-wheeled Bond Bug. The car is owned by 69-year-old Parkinsons victim Ian.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on a crumbling Mini Mayfair bought by Donna with her late fathers inheritance.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: A look at what went wrong during the demolition of Michigans Pontiac Silverdome. And investigate the toppling of a turbine in Ontario.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Investigating air disasters, hijackings, bombings and other disasters using re-enactments and CGI.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Investigators must rely on a reconstruction along with witness statements to determine what went wrong when a plane crashes after take-off.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: A hi-tech underwater scan reveals a tragic WW2 ship sunk at sea. The wreckage from one of Hitlers U-boats continues to leave a Nazi legacy.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler Takes on the West
programme.desc: Nine months after the onset of World War II, Hitler attacks Belgium, the Netherlands, France and Great Britain with intense violence.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler Takes on the West
programme.desc: France is in chaos as the Germans take over half the country. The French people are taking to the roads, trying to escape, whilst the government signs an armistice.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Investigation into British Airways flight number 38s crash near Heathrow in 2008. Two minutes before it touched down, double engine failure crippled the plane.

programme.title: Seconds From Disaster
programme.desc: In 1982, a delayed flight from the US capital crashed into a bridge on the River Potomac. All but five of the passengers perished under the water. A look at what happened.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz restore a Land Rover Discovery Series 1, which is rotting in a field. With a project this huge, Tim pulls off a big celebrity finale.

programme.title: Flintoff
programme.desc: An intimate look at the life of one of Britains most beloved sportsmen, Andrew "Freddie" Flintoff. Documenting his compelling life story from winning two Ashes series for England, to becoming a British TV icon, and returning to the game.

programme.title: Planes That Changed History
programme.desc: In 1981, the F-117 Nighthawk became the worlds first stealth aircraft. Explore how its futuristic design made this unconventional aircraft all but invisible to radar. A decade after its inception, the Nighthawk was put to the test in the Gulf War.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: A routine flight from London Heathrow Airport to Belfast ended in tragedy when British Midland Flight 92 crashed on a highway embankment near the town of Kegworth on 8th January 1989. Due to an engine failure, the crew should have made an emergency landing. Unfortunately, the pilots misidentified which engine was faulty and switched off the wrong one, causing a catastrophic crash near the M1 motorway. The survivors give first-hand accounts of what the terrible crash was like.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: In May 2020, Pakistan International Airlines flight 8303 crashed in a densely populated area of Karachi, Pakistan. Experts explain what caused this mysterious crash.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The pilots of Proteus Airlines Flight 706 deviate from their flight path to give their passengers a better view of a legendary French ocean liner. Just as they complete the loop, the plane explodes. As the tragedy sinks in, so does the mystery.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: On the 24th of February 1989, part of the right-side fuselage of United Airlines Flight 811 rips off, ejecting nine people from the aircraft and causing explosive decompression. The flight later lands safely at Honolulu without any more loss of life.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Shortly after taking off from Shanghai, Korean Air Flight 6316 disappears from radar and slams into a residential neighbourhood. Investigators from China, South Korea, and the US join forces.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Hitlers Last Stand
programme.desc: A Canadian regiment strikes a Panzer unit accused of horrific war crimes. Meanwhile, German troops cling to the critical hub of Caen.

programme.title: Hitlers Last Stand
programme.desc: With Hitler dead, an American Tank commander leads a race to save VIP prisoners from a castle in the Alps. But when loyal Nazis strike, they struggle to hold out.

programme.title: Erased: WW2s Heroes of Color
programme.desc: Unearthing the hidden heroes of the 320th Barrage Balloon Battalion, the only all-Black combat unit to fight on the D-Day beaches and helped liberate Europe.

programme.title: Nazi Sunken Sub
programme.desc: In 1945, the Nazi submarine U-745 mysteriously disappeared. Now a group of divers head deep below the Baltic to reveal what really happened.

programme.title: Decoding Historys Prophecies
programme.sub-title: Liu Bowen, Caesars Soothsayer, Alloa Tower
programme.desc: In 14th century China, the brilliant Liu Bowen lends his talents and prophetic predictions to a dynasty on the rise. After declaring himself dictator of Rome, Julius Caesar receives a chilling divination. Why didnt he heed the warnings?

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: Francis Drake is cemented in history as the worlds most controversial pirate.

programme.title: Colosseum: Rise and Fall
programme.desc: New discoveries and cutting-edge research reveal the origins of the Colosseum and how it helped Rome build an empire.

programme.title: Colosseum: Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Explores how Romes emperors used the Colosseum and its blood-soaked gladiator games to unite an empire behind symbols of Roman power.

programme.title: Colosseum: Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Experts investigate Italys Colosseum - the largest ancient amphitheatre - to understand the true nature of gladiatorial games and their role in the rise and fall of the Roman empire.

programme.title: The Lost Tomb of Alexander the Great
programme.desc: Archaeologist Pepi Papakosta is on a mission to find Alexander the Greats lost tomb. Excavating in the centre of Alexandria, Egypt, she has discovered a rare statue of Alexander and secret tunnels.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The crash of a Korean cargo plane outside London baffled investigators. Was the first officer more concerned with saving face than the plane?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: EgyptAir Flight 804 suddenly spirals into the Mediterranean Sea. Although early evidence suggests a fire broke out on board, Egyptian authorities say it was an act of terror.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible: Secrets of Faith
programme.desc: Archaeologists decode the hidden secrets of the Dead Sea Scrolls.

programme.title: Planes That Changed History
programme.desc: Explore 125 years of aviation by uncovering how iconic aircraft have radically reshaped our world and revealing the ingenious engineering behind its success.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: A routine flight from London Heathrow Airport to Belfast ended in tragedy when British Midland Flight 92 crashed on a highway embankment near the town of Kegworth on 8th January 1989. Due to an engine failure, the crew should have made an emergency landing. Unfortunately, the pilots misidentified which engine was faulty and switched off the wrong one, causing a catastrophic crash near the M1 motorway. The survivors give first-hand accounts of what the terrible crash was like.

programme.title: Michael Buble: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: "Caught in the Act" is the second live album released by Canadian jazz crooner Michael Buble. It was filmed and recorded at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles. The filmed concert was aired on PBS as an episode of Great Performances, and the show was subsequently released on DVD along with the audio CD to create the album package, although the audio disc only featured eight of the songs from the concert.

programme.desc: The 16-song collection, Free Spirit, filmed in London, England returned Paul Rodgers to his roots, bringing fans an extraordinary evening.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo travel across the UK to find unique items lost in peoples homes to fix up for a profit. This episode features 17th-century wooden beams.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry and Simon get revved up in Pembrokeshire as they explore mechanic Jamess sheds, which are crammed with classic cars, motorbikes and tractors, including a 1928 Model A Ford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Dealers Roo Irvine and David Harper hunt for antiques to sell at auction. Starting off in Lincolnshire, they travel far and wide in their powerful - and very loud - replica 1960s AC Cobra. Using their highly tuned antiquing skills, they scour the shops in an attempt to seek out the best items their budget affords. Along the way, they step away from the antiques shops to discover unusual historical sites. David visits Hull to test out his sea legs, heading out to sea on an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and David Harper are driving around Yorkshire and Country Durham in a noisy and sporty 1960s motor, seeking out antiques to sell at auction. David buys an old fishing stool in the hope of landing a big profit at the Newcastle auction. However, the joke may be on Roo, who splashes out on an unusual purchase of a parachuting clown. A detour from the antiques emporia of York sees David discover a little-known 19th-century inventor whose incredible innovations are still relevant today.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques aficionados Roo Irvine and David Harper are on the third leg of their road trip, cruising around the north west in their trusty chariot, a replica 1960s AC Cobra. When David finds a carved cat at the bargain price of a pound, hes confident it will make a purr-fect profit at the Dundee auction. He also takes a journey back in time to discover the horrifying environment of the workhouses that were once prevalent across the country.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Scottish lassie Roo Irvine finds herself with home advantage as shes joined by David Harper on the west coast of Scotland for this leg of their road trip. After Roos head gets stuck in an antique, she decides to stick with what she knows best: old glass. Aside from buying antiques, Roo indulges her sweet tooth and learns about gelato and why this Italian dessert is so popular in Scotland. David examines a rare personal collection that tells the story of a once-booming industry.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Its the last outing for antiques dealers Roo Irvine and David Harper, and they are on a whistle-stop tour of the Lake District, battling each other, and the elements, in a sporty classic car. Davids hunt for antiques unearths a secret map issued by the RAF, but with time ticking before the auction, Roo gambles on a Georgian longcase clock. David learns about the Cambrian sport of hound trailing, which sees dogs running for miles with only the scent of aniseed to guide them.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Paper conservator Louise Drover rescues a water-damaged pastel portrait of a young couple. Owner Simon cherishes the portrait of him and his late wife Vicky, captured whilst on holiday in their youth. It is a delicate task for Louise as she uses more moisture to tackle the stubborn water stain. Mechanical maestro Steve Fletcher takes receipt of a 1950s toy rocket that once had sparks.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Electrics expert Mark Stuckey and silversmith Brenton West join forces to repair a much-loved, sparkling chandelier that once took pride of place in a council house. Owner Suzannes mum Pat worked as a cleaner for a wealthy couple who gifted her the cherished chandelier. A constant in her own childhood, Suzanne and her daughter Grace are delighted to return to see it back to its former glory.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First up is a pinball penny slot machine, originally at the bar of a village pub run by owner Jeannines family. Jeannine was brought up just opposite the pub, and this antique pinball machine now provides a tangible link to her predecessors.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Dealers Roo Irvine and David Harper hunt for antiques to sell at auction. Starting off in Lincolnshire, they travel far and wide in their powerful - and very loud - replica 1960s AC Cobra. Using their highly tuned antiquing skills, they scour the shops in an attempt to seek out the best items their budget affords. Along the way, they step away from the antiques shops to discover unusual historical sites. David visits Hull to test out his sea legs, heading out to sea on an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and David Harper are driving around Yorkshire and Country Durham in a noisy and sporty 1960s motor, seeking out antiques to sell at auction. David buys an old fishing stool in the hope of landing a big profit at the Newcastle auction. However, the joke may be on Roo, who splashes out on an unusual purchase of a parachuting clown. A detour from the antiques emporia of York sees David discover a little-known 19th-century inventor whose incredible innovations are still relevant today.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques aficionados Roo Irvine and David Harper are on the third leg of their road trip, cruising around the north west in their trusty chariot, a replica 1960s AC Cobra. When David finds a carved cat at the bargain price of a pound, hes confident it will make a purr-fect profit at the Dundee auction. He also takes a journey back in time to discover the horrifying environment of the workhouses that were once prevalent across the country.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

After Roos head gets stuck in an antique, she decides to stick with what she knows best: old glass. Aside from buying antiques, Roo indulges her sweet tooth and learns about gelato and why this Italian dessert is so popular in Scotland. David examines a rare personal collection that tells the story of a once-booming industry.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Its the last outing for antiques dealers Roo Irvine and David Harper, and they are on a whistle-stop tour of the Lake District, battling each other, and the elements, in a sporty classic car. Davids hunt for antiques unearths a secret map issued by the RAF, but with time ticking before the auction, Roo gambles on a Georgian longcase clock. David learns about the Cambrian sport of hound trailing, which sees dogs running for miles with only the scent of aniseed to guide them.

programme.desc: After the death of John Kennedy, Jacqueline Kennedy sought comfort in her relationship with David Ormsby-Gore, later Lord Harlech. Fifty years on, the letters that passed between them have been discovered in two locked boxes at Glyn Cywarch, the Welsh house of the Harlech family.

programme.title: Pavarotti in Central Park
programme.desc: Luciano Pavarotti performs in Central Park with flutist Andrea Griminelli, members of the New York Philharmonic and the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A cunning woman who attempts to take advantage of a struggling young artist meets her match in his model, Fatima.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A greedy wife has a cunning plan to get rid of her wealthy husband, but he has a few tricks of his own up his sleeve.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Henpecked Arthur decides to get rid of his demanding wife once and for all, so long as he gets her money. Unfortunately for him, his wife has a few secrets of her own.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: The fine line between love and hate is stretched to breaking point when two old school friends share a house.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Jack and Betsy are long-term lovers. That is until Jack decides to move halfway across the world to be with his new Australian lover, but Betsy isnt going to make it easy.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A reformed gambler (Gig Young) tries to keep his bright, younger brother (Robert Redford) from following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A psychology professor (Jeffrey Hunter) has his fiancee (Vera Miles) to act as bait for a campus killer.

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.sub-title: Alistair Maclean To John Le Carre
programme.desc: Cold War storytelling comes alive with Forsyth, MacLean and le Carre, with iconic scenes from `The Third Man and more.

programme.title: The Hollies: Look Through Any Window 1963 - 1975
programme.desc: All the bands beloved hits.

programme.title: Supershow - The Last Great Jam Of The 60s!
programme.desc: In one of the great musical events of the 1960s, musicians including Eric Clapton and Buddy Guy converged on an abandoned factory for a two-day journey of music and celebration.

programme.title: The Cure: Anniversary 1978-2018 Live in Hyde Park
programme.desc: English rock band The Cure honour their 40 years together with a live concert at Londons Hyde Park in July 2018.

programme.title: Siouxsie and The Banshees: Nocturne
programme.desc: Rockers Siouxsie and The Banshees performed at Londons Royal Albert Hall in 1983, featuring Robert Smith of The Cure on guitar.

programme.title: The Public Image Is Rotten
programme.desc: British rock icon John Lydon and his fellow bandmates recall the years they spent performing as Public Image Ltd.

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: An energising film telling the story of a vital national protest movement - Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: A fascinating look at how Britain produced so many iconic bands, beginning with the phenomenal influence of its art schools.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: A fascinating look at how Britain produced so many iconic bands, beginning with the phenomenal influence of its art schools.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.sub-title: Sex Pistols: Never Mind the Bollocks
programme.desc: The Sex Pistols rendition of the national anthem caused anarchy in the UK. These boys werent pretty but they werent vacant either, as John Lydon, Steve Jones and Malcolm Mclaren explain.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The evil mummy Imhotep returns to wreak havoc as he resumes his relentless search for power and immortality. To make matters worse, another ancient evil has been unleashed, even more dangerous than Imhotep. Only the heroic Rick OConnell and his intrepid Egyptologist wife stand in the way of these twin terrors as they embark upon a desperate mission to save the world.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Adaptation of the adventures of the swinging comic-strip hero. A shy student becomes a crime fighter after a bite from a mutant spider, during a school outing, gives him extraordinary powers. As he comes to terms with his new-found abilities, he is also forced to contend with a maniac villain known as the Green Goblin.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8
programme.desc: The globetrotting crew faces an unexpected challenge when a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. Now, they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Jurassic Park is now called Jurassic World, a fully functional dinosaur park that sees 20,000 visitors a year, the realisation of owner John Hammonds dreams. The scientists may have gone too far in creating some sort of hybrid dinosaur, which escapes and terrorises the park.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: When Trojan prince Paris woos Helen, Queen of Sparta, away from her husband Menelaus, the legendary warrior Achilles is called to lead the armies of Greece against the city fortress of Troy.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood dreams of discovering an idea that will change peoples lives forever, and after several misguided attempts he may just have done it. Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Based on the comic books.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: The village is being overrun by rabbits and Wallace has a plan to alter their minds so that they will leave the vegetable allotments alone. However, his plan goes awry and the rabbit problem escalates when the villagers discover a monstrous `were-rabbit destroying everything in its sights. Will Wallace and Gromit be able to solve the conundrum before the creature gets shot?

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: 10 Lives
programme.desc: A pampered cat takes for granted the lucky hand he has been dealt after he is rescued and loved by Rose, a kind-hearted and passionate student. When he loses his ninth life, fate steps in to set him on a transformative journey.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Rock Dog 3: Battle the Beat
programme.desc: Hoping to inspire a new generation of rock stars, Bodi joins a musical competition show and becomes an overnight TV personality sensation.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, `Thunderbirds-style squad of puppets lead Americas war on terrorism. The creators of `South Park go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: National Lampoons Vacation
programme.desc: A Chicago family sets out for a two-week road trip to California and encounters every conceivable mishap along the way.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: A special agent recruits former models Derek Zoolander and Hansel to save the worlds most beautiful people from a deadly plot.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: Misfits realise their dreams of becoming cops when a mayoral decree forces the police academy to open its doors to all.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Bucks brothers three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, the question remains -- just who is running the government?

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, the question remains -- just who is running the government?

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: Mollys Game
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defence lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunts 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucys big celebration.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: A spoiled rat gets flushed down the toilet and finds himself stranded in Londons sewer underworld. A savvy scavenger helps him evade frog assassins and make his way back to his plush home.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: After moving to New York City, kung fu prodigy Li Fong enters a karate competition -- but his skills alone arent enough. With help from Mr. Han and Daniel LaRusso, he soon learns to merge two styles into one for the ultimate martial arts showdown.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: The Witches
programme.desc: Creepy fairy tale following the fortunes of a young orphan who becomes embroiled in a supernatural adventure. Brought up on his kindly grandmothers scary stories about witches, he stumbles on a real coven while on holiday. Overhearing their plans to capture all the children in Britain, he sets out to stop them, remaining undeterred throughout - even when he has been turned into a mouse.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Sky Originals
programme.desc: Not sure what to watch next? Then discover some of the greatest British Sky Originals. From Four Kids and It to SAS Red Notice, theres something here for everyone.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: A kung fu expert is assigned to penetrate an island fortress to destroy an opium and white slavery empire.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with King Arthurs rule of peace and freedom, Malagant, an erstwhile ally, turns against the Round Table and establishes a hostile domain. However, he goes too far when he kidnaps the queen and imprisons her in an appalling dungeon. The special skills of the glittering and impetuous swordsman Lancelot must be called upon to effect her rescue.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3
programme.desc: Murtaugh is only days away from retirement when he and Riggs, along with officer Lorna Cole, are assigned to track down a crooked ex-cop who is supplying huge consignments of guns to gangs.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Detective Riggs and Murtaugh are called into action to foil a Chinese crime lord who is selling immigrants into slavery on American soil. The pair arent as young as they used to be, and ending up on a Triad hit list doesnt make things easy for them either.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: On a remote island, a wealthy entrepreneur creates a theme park featuring living dinosaurs drawn from prehistoric DNA. Before opening the attraction to the public, he invites a top palaeontologist, palaeobotanist, mathematician/theorist, and his two eager grandchildren to experience the park. Their park visit is anything but tranquil as the parks security system breaks down, and the prehistoric creatures break out.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Sequel in which the entrepreneur who genetically engineered the dinosaurs in Jurassic Park transpires to have cloned more of the prehistoric monsters on another island location. Researchers arrive to observe the creatures in their natural habitat, but hot on their heels is a band of mercenaries intent on capturing the dinosaurs and transporting them back to San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dr Alan Grant reluctantly accompanies a rich couple who are searching for their teenage son who crashed on the second Jurassic Park island while paragliding. Unfortunately for the adventurers, there are many unfamiliar - and deadly - dinosaurs lurking in the jungle.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, four women prepare for an epic battle as mischievous ghosts start to wreak havoc in New York.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: Frodo is a hobbit who elects to become the bearer of the Ring of Power, which, if reclaimed by its maker and master Lord Sauron, will see him gain full and terrible power over all of Middle Earth. Frodo sets out with The Fellowship of the Ring, led by Gandalf and Aragorn, and six other companions to Saurons stronghold, Mordor, the only place where the ring can be destroyed.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: Hobbits Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. A mercurial creature who has been warped by the Ring, Gollum promises to guide the Hobbits to the Black Gates of Mordor if they will release him. Middle-earth Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Sarumans deadly spell.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: The final part of the fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens epic tale. Despite Gollum, hobbits Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the `one ring, while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Saurons evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith. Then, to buy Frodo and Sam time, they must march to the very gates of Mordor to distract Saurons gaze from the Ring bearer.

Though their assignments constantly put their own lives at stake, the duos endless bickering and inane antics mean they must carry out hits without being derailed by their own incompetence. programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins decide that everyone must get active and turn Tickety town into a boot camp. With Tommy banging his drum and Tallulah blowing on her trumpet, soon everyone is lifting, running, puffing and panting. They are all so exhausted that they fall fast asleep, but with Chime Time imminent, they must find a way to wake up Puffertys wheels.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Hopparoo bursts all their bubbles with his sharp ears, the twins use McCoggins extra-strong bubble mixture instead and blow a bubble so huge that it engulfs Battersby, Madame Au Lait, McCoggins, Lopsiloo, Chikidee and finally Tommy and Tallulah themselves! Where is Hopparoo? Only his sharp ears can free them for Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah love dressing up and surprising each other with their crazy costumes, but when they decide to surprise everybody else in town too Hopparoo is not impressed. In their efforts to surprise the bunny, they give the Spring Chicks such a fright that they barricade themselves in front of the clockhouse, blocking the way to Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is teaching the twins pottery, and to inspire them she shows them a magnificent cow pot that she made on her wheel, but when she leaves them to their enthusiastic pot-making, they accidentally smash it and when they try to repair it, they only make things worse. Trying to re-create the pot is even more of a disaster. Huge quantities of clay fly from their wheel into the town, blocking Puffertys tracks.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Hopparoo is disappointed when everyone gathers for Measuring Time. He was sure hed grown more than that! Tommy and Tallulah have some crazy ideas about how to add inches, but a super-tall rabbit rampaging through town on stilts can only cause chaos.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are playing pirates. They are hunting for Madame Au Laits treasure, but rival pirate Hopparoo keeps trying to commandeer their cardboard boat by telling them that its Chime Time, causing them twice to abandon ship and run! So they dont believe him when Chime Time really comes round.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are under strict instructions to keep clean for Madame Au Laits town photograph, but this proves difficult when the rest of the town need their help with some messy jobs. So when its Photo Time, they are covered in mud, compost and feathers.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Talluah are determined to throw a magnificent party for McCoggins birthday. They get everyone involved and have fun organising the decorations, music and food, but Chikidee gets stuck in a giant cake and rolls around causing chaos.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: After a customer is thrown out of a pub for fighting, he takes revenge in a horrific way: by driving at high speed into a group of locals. Also, some diners in a restaurant try to leave without paying, but the owner cottons on to their plan.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Two young girls watch on in fear as their shop-owner dad grapples with a dangerous gunman. Also, someone is stealing money from a frail 93-year-old, and any one of a large number of visitors could be the culprit.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A frightening case of road rage unfolds as a drunk man attacks another car with an axe, and a truck takes out a car in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A pedestrian is lucky to be alive after a stroll down the motorway, and a commuter spies another driver doing something he shouldnt.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: When a truck crashes the driver tries to lie his way out of trouble, unaware that cameras have caught it all.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Head to Americas far north for a look at the ultimate brawlers living along the waterways. See how spring thaw fuels rivalries and eagles take on herons, bears against bears and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant bugs.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Completing the trips final lap in the untamed lands where Australias interior desert meets the hot, hostile Indian Ocean. Lizzie confront the challenges of survival in this region as she dives with tiger sharks, manta rays, and nomadic turtles.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Albert, Herbie and Quincy: Do rounds on the ranch that Albert the camel runs with his human friend Alex, then check in with Herbie the wallaby as he gets pampered.

programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: A calf navigates the Okavango Delta; a Bull searches for a mate; and a Matriarch leads her family through the desert. These individual adventures combine to tell the story of Africas most iconic species.

programme.title: How The Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Unravelling the secrets of the most extreme sleepers of the animal kingdom; answering why and how animals sleep, how they deal with sleep deprivation and if animals dream.

programme.title: Bugs That Rule the World
programme.desc: Scientists and enthusiasts reveal the crucial roles bugs play on the planet and what the future would be without them.

programme.title: Bugs That Rule the World
programme.desc: The colourful world of Earths essential pollinators -- bees, moths and butterflies.

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Across the planet, wolves and lions lead two legendary predator lineages: canids and felines. We explore their differences and similarities, from brute strength to social intelligence, revealing who dominates in each territory.

programme.title: Monkey Island
programme.desc: Not everyone in Sri Lankas monkey paradise is equal. Anna sits at the bottom of the social ladder, and with a newborn baby life is getting tougher. As drought grips the region and tensions boil over, can she do enough to keep her son alive?

programme.title: Monkey Island
programme.desc: An ancient citadel once home to Sri Lankas kings has now been reclaimed by the jungle and there is a new dynasty in power.

programme.title: Monkey Island
programme.desc: Tufted grey langurs share their territory with a troop of toque macaques and a group of purple face leaf monkeys. This is primate paradise. But a crippling drought changes everything. The three species are forced to adapt and take risks.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David descends beneath the waves at night in the state of the art Triton submersible, the first of its kind to visit the reef. He meets some of the tiny coral animals that built the reef and helped to turn it into an underwater wonderland.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David continues his exploration of the Great Barrier Reef, aboard the research vessel the Alucia. He discovers the incredible animals that visit the reef every year, from birds to whales, some travelling thousands of kilometres to get there.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David examines what the next few decades hold for this remarkable community of animals, as well as what is being done to save it.

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride
programme.desc: Two Mothers, Nine Cubs: Chilli and her five cubs encounter young mother Inara and her four. See what happens when their standoff resolves into an unusual blended family.

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, an African wild dog pack find themselves outnumbered by lions and hyenas. Their pups must learn quickly if the pack is to survive.

programme.title: Wild Dogs
programme.desc: Discover how natural selection and human-made pressures are affecting and influencing canid species across the globe, like the raccoon dog, the golden jackal, and the maned wolf.

programme.title: Wild Dogs
programme.desc: Discover the ways in which natural selection and human pressure have shaped the raccoon dog, the golden jackal and the maned wolf.

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, an African wild dog pack find themselves outnumbered by lions and hyenas. Their pups must learn quickly if the pack is to survive.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: The southwest corner of New Zealands South Island is hemmed in by giant mountains and the rough Pacific Ocean. Rare penguins are locked in a daily game of cat and mouse with giant New Zealand sea lions. The sea lions also live in a tumultuous world, where pups must battle the elements to survive.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: In southwestern New Zealand, deep fiords and tidal lagoons are wrapped in green rainforest. The dark fjords harbour creatures normally found in the deep. As winter approaches, bottlenose dolphins must escape their freezing fjord, while in a mountain river, a longfin eel heeds the call of the sea.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: The south-eastern coast of New Zealand are some of the richest fishing grounds in the world. Young marine animals transition from novices to independent adults. Young whales, dolphins and seals learn to hunt, learn the rules of society, or strike out on their own adventures.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Theres strength in numbers, especially in the wild. For many species, its the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Epic flights, adventurous sea journeys, and exhausting road trips all play a key part in the lives of many species. These empires travel in search of food, shelter, or a mate.

programme.title: Land of the Far North
programme.desc: This documentary shows the wonderful polar world of northern Scandinavia. In summer, the sun barely sets. Despite an abundance of food, plants and animals face many challenges.

programme.title: Land of the Far North
programme.desc: Despite the darkness and cold at the Arctic Circle, plants and animals manage to survive.

programme.title: Africas Claws and Jaws
programme.desc: Sharks are among the planets oldest and most highly evolved predators. Along southern Africas coast, pioneers dedicate their lives to learning more about these creatures, and spreading awareness about their plight.

programme.title: Africas Claws and Jaws
programme.desc: Reptiles have conquered just about every habitat and have evolved a remarkable array of adaptations, making them the undisputed masters of the underworld.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Get acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learn how billions of years worth of changes, from ice ages to asteroid strikes, have shaped their looks and skills. Meet blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs, and much more.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Get acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learn how billions of years worth of changes, from ice ages to asteroid strikes, have shaped their looks and skills. Meet blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs, and much more.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Exploring the bizarre mating rituals of the oceans most peculiar creatures. Learning how bloody battles for mates, gender bending, and super-size litters of babies might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Right beneath our feet is a secret world of disguise and espionage, social networking and courtship, rape and pillage, parenthood and relationships. Sir David Attenborough investigates how macroscopic residents outwit their enemies to survive.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Its a bug-eating world out there, and the documentary continues with a look at how the various critters disable the defences of their respective prey.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Dating is just as tricky a business in the insect world, and Sir David Attenborough finds out how certain bugs choose and then woo their partners.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough reveals how different bugs usher in the next generation, including the butterfly and harvestman spider.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Join Sir David Attenborough as he zooms in on a set of bugs who prefer co-operation to conflict. Features the likes of the burrowing cockroach and the queen bee.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough takes a tour of the insect worlds vast colonies, which rival human megacities in terms of size and complexity.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Hermit Crab
programme.desc: The Secret Life of the Hermit Crab chronicles the journey of a small community of Hermit crabs in Guadeloupe.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: The Big Dry
programme.desc: The Luangwa Valley in Zambia experiences one of the toughest dry seasons imaginable. This comprises of seven months with no rain and spiraling temperatures. This time, the drought is threatening to be even more intense than usual.

programme.title: The Big Dry
programme.desc: The drought in the Luangwa valley strengthens due to a global El Nino event. There has been no rain since April and desperate animals are drawn to the only source of water left in the valley, the Luangwa River.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.sub-title: Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: The team in saves a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, a visit to the Rescue Centre, where a harbour seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.sub-title: Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: The Rescue team tries to save an otter as Dr Marty battles rough conditions to help an entangled sea lion. At the Rescue Centre, a mischievous seal pup puts himself in danger.

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.desc: Paramedics in Oxford treat a woman suffering from a mystery illness, while in Portsmouth, the crews treat an elderly diabetic patient with dangerously low blood sugar.

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis gets whisked away by adventurer and television presenter Bear Grylls to visit his private island, where he is staying for the summer with his wife Shara.

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: In 2019, Wagatha Christie gripped Britain as Coleen Rooney accused Rebekah Vardy of leaking stories about her to the tabloid press. Despite huge media attention on this social media scandal, and a trial that ended up in the high-court in the summer of 2022, with Rooney emerging victorious, the inside story of how and why this extraordinary moment in British culture came to pass, has never fully been told - until now.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics are sent to help a 49-year-old who has fallen in the street after a night out in Stoke, while in Dudley, paramedics visit a 5-month-old who has a temperature and isnt drinking.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish railway journey reaches Aberdeen. From the Granite City, Michael heads straight out to a dramatic piece of coastline 18 miles to its north.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the Culloden Viaduct aboard the Caledonian Sleeper to arrive bright and early in the coastal city of Inverness, from which he heads north on a magnificent scenic adventure to the Orkney archipelago.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the impressive Cullen viaduct before enjoying a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. Heading west along the firth, Michael reaches Forres Station and the seaside village of Findhorn, where he meets members of an eco-community founded in the 1960s. At the Findhorn Foundation, Michael discovers spiritual energy, sacred dancing and a history of very large vegetables.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish coastal railway journey reaches Invergordon on the Cromarty Firth, the third great inlet on the northeast coast of the Highlands.

programme.title: Restoration Workshop
programme.desc: Gary Wallis clears a barn full of old treasures. His buys include a weathervane and the wooden sides of a horse-drawn cart, which undergo an amazing reinvention.

programme.title: Restoration Workshop
programme.desc: Gary goes hell-for-leather organising an antiques fair. He buys some military tripods and a vintage truck grille and repurposes them as stunning pieces of furniture.

programme.title: Dream Car Garage
programme.desc: Client Mark has always dreamed of owning a chrome-bumpered MGB convertible, but fixers Sheldon Nichols and Peter Harriott must find clever ways to finance that dream.

programme.title: Dream Car Fixers
programme.desc: Driving instructor Brian loved his Fiat 500 until it rusted away - now Sheldon and Peter must come up with a dream car for no more than 10,000 pounds to make any money.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher and Godber try to get through the night as they try to imagine what they would be doing on the outside, and who they would be doing it with.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: When Fletch and Godber are allowed out in a work gang, Mr Barrowclough gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletch has fallen out with the governor and has lost all his credibility as a result. Yet, he soon sees a way of getting back into his good books.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: On the last leg of his journey across England, Robbie crosses an epic aqueduct near Stratford-upon-Avon and gets stuck in a lock in central Birmingham.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming begins his 170-mile journey across the north of England and soon runs into difficulty when he encounters a propeller problem in Wigan and runs aground in Blackburn. Nevertheless, he pushes on to navigate a true wonder of the waterways, the Burnley Embankment.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater and film-maker Robbie Cumming crosses the Pennines on the picturesque Leeds and Liverpool Canal, and lends a hand to hire boaters in Gargrave, North Yorkshire. He also encounters Bingley Five Rise Locks, a wonder of the inland waterways.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Jump on board with narrowboater Robbie Cumming as he explores the Victorian village of Saltaire on the Leeds and Liverpool Canal, moors up in Leeds and goes in search of an abandoned waterway on the Aire and Calder Navigation.

programme.title: Dom Chineas Cornish Workshop
programme.desc: Dom finishes the summer with new refurbished windows sealing the weather out of the workshop. Later, he and Sam head to St Agnes to buy Cornish tin to cast a workshop sign.

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon visits Peru and Bolivia, travelling through the Andes mountains. Simon starts his journey at the world-famous ruins of Machu Pichu, one of the glories of the ancient Inca civilization.

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon travels through three of the worlds most extreme environments: the salt flats of Bolivia, the Brazilian Pantanal and Paraguays Chaco Forest. In Bolivia, Simon meets a family who makes a living carving salt from the Uyuni salt flats.

programme.title: David Jasons Great British Inventions
programme.desc: Sir David gets behind the controls of a tank as he finds out about the British inventors who gave us some of the most extreme machines on the planet.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Charlie picks up an iconic 60s motor - a Ford Cortina Deluxe - and a 1970s Morris van brings a taste of Carry On Camping to Pickering.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Expert hauliers Eric Harrison and Chris Case move a Deltic diesel, better known as The Royal Highland Fusilier, halfway across the country to the Telford Steam Fair.

programme.title: Train Truckers

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: World at War

programme.title: World at War

Eventually Hitler declared war on America, thus relieving Roosevelt of a difficult decision.
